author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(MenuSelect): use a slot for "all" (algolia/vue-instantsearch#595)
body:
* feat(MenuSelect): use a slot for "all"

This is a breaking change, change from `<ais-menu-select :label="all">` to `<ais-menu-select><template slot="all">all</template></ais-menu-selecte>`

* docs(menuselect): update usage

* chore: rename to `defaultOption`

* docs: update option

Co-Authored-By: Haroenv <fingebimus@me.com>
